column1: - I'm fine.________________you hear about Mr Watkins, the maths teacher?

- He fell out of the window of his classroom! 

- _________________pushed him?

- He was sitting on the windowsill and he just fell backwards!

- Oh dear! Poor Mr Watkins. __________he turn?

- No. Luckily his classroom is on the ground floor.

- That's lucky! _____________you there at the time?

- Yes! We were having a maths lesson.

- So__________did you all do?

- We ran outside to help him. We were all laughing, though! 

- ___________he think it was funny, too?

- Not at first, but he laughed about it afterwards.
